import React, { useState } from "react"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter} from 'react-router-dom'; let theme = [ { id : 1, Name : "Theme 1", Price : "Price 1", Description : "Details 1 " }, { id : 2, Name : "Theme 2", Price : "Price 2", Description : "Details 2 " }, { id : 3, Name : "Theme 3", Price : "Price 3", Description : "Details 3 " }, { id : 4, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " }, { id : 5, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " }, { id : 6, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " } ] function AdminTheme () { const[themeName,setTheme_Name]=useState(''); const[themePrice,setTheme_Price]=useState(''); const[themeDesc,setTheme_Desc]=useState(''); const[themes,setThemes]=useState([]); const handleClick=(e)=>{ e.preventDefault() const theme={themeName,themePrice,themeDesc} console.log(theme) fetch("http://localhost:8080/admin/addTheme", { method:"POST", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body:JSON.stringify(theme) }).then(()=>{alert("Theme Submitted")}) } useEffect(()=>{ fetch("http://localhost:8080/admin/viewGift") .then(res=>res.json()) .then((result)=>{ setThemes(result); } ) },[]) return <>
Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/admin/addGift" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/admin/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout




{themes.map(theme => { return(
< div className="box" id = {theme.id}> Theme Name : {theme.Name}
Theme Price : {theme.Price}
Theme Details : {theme.Description}
< Link to = "/editTheme" className="link1"> Edit < Link to = "/editTheme" className="link1"> Delete

) })}









Add Themes





setTheme_Name(e.target.value)}>

setTheme_Price(e.target.value)}>

setTheme_Desc(e.target.value)}>







} export default AdminTheme;
